tuning: E A D G B E
content:
These chords were copied down verbatim from the recording, but if you 
transpose them downward by a half step, they should fit nicely into
guitar-friendly chords (i.[ch]E[/ch]. [ch]C[/ch], [ch]Dm[/ch], [ch]Am[/ch], [ch]F[/ch], [ch]G[/ch], and so on).

Message me if you have requests for tabs of well-known songs that haven't been done yet.


BASS PATTERN:
Verse: [ch]Db[/ch], [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Eb[/ch], [ch]Gb[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch], [ch]Db[/ch] [ch]Gb[/ch], [ch]Gb[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch], [ch]Ab[/ch] (syncopated rhythm)
Chorus: [ch]Bb[/ch], [ch]Db[/ch] [ch]Gb[/ch], [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Db[/ch], [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch], [ch]Bb[/ch], [ch]Db[/ch] [ch]Gb[/ch], [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch], [ch]Ab[/ch]


  INTRO
[tab]  [ch]Db[/ch]           [ch]Ebm[/ch] 
  Oh oh oh oh, oh oh oh oh,[/tab]

[tab]  [ch]Bbm[/ch]          [ch]Gb[/ch]    [ch]Ab[/ch]
  oh oh oh oh, oh oh oh oh[/tab]


  VERSE
[tab]  [ch]Db[/ch]                             [ch]Ebm[/ch]
  Keep drinking coffee, stare me down across the table[/tab]
  
[tab]  [ch]Bbm[/ch]                   [ch]Gb[/ch]   [ch]Ab[/ch]
      While I look outside[/tab]
  
[tab]  [ch]Db[/ch]                        [ch]Ebm[/ch]
  So many things I'd say if only I were able, but I[/tab]
  
[tab]  [ch]Bbm[/ch]                           [ch]Gb[/ch]        [ch]Ab[/ch]
  just keep quiet and count the cars that pass by[/tab]

[tab]  [ch]Db[/ch]                       [ch]Ebm[/ch]
  You've got opinions man, we're all entitled to 'em[/tab]
  
[tab]  [ch]Bbm[/ch]                   [ch]Gb[/ch]   [ch]Ab[/ch]
      But I never asked[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Db[/ch]                                         [ch]Ebm[/ch]
  So let me thank you for your time, and try not to waste any more of mine[/tab]
  
[tab]  [ch]Bbm[/ch]                   [ch]Gb[/ch]   [ch]Ab[/ch]
      Get out of here fast[/tab]


  PRE-CHORUS
[tab]            [ch]Ebm7[/ch]              [ch]Gb[/ch]                  [ch]Bbm[/ch]
  I hate to break it to you babe, but I'm not drowning[/tab]
 
[tab]          [ch]Absus4[/ch]         [ch]Ab[/ch]
  There's no one here to save[/tab]


  CHORUS
[tab]  [ch]Bbm[/ch]              [ch]Gb[/ch]                [ch]Db[/ch]
  Who cares if you disagree, you are not me[/tab]

[tab]               [ch]Ab[/ch]
  Who made you king of anything, so[/tab]

[tab]  [ch]Bbm[/ch]               [ch]Gb[/ch]            [ch]Db[/ch]/[ch]F[/ch]
  You dare tell me who to be, who died[/tab]

[tab]               [ch]Absus4[/ch]  [ch]Ab[/ch]
  And made you king of anything?[/tab]


  INSTRUMENTAL
[tab]  [ch]Db[/ch] [ch]Ebm[/ch] [ch]Bbm[/ch] [ch]Gb[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]
  (oh oh oh oh)[/tab]


  VERSE
[tab]  [ch]Db[/ch]                   [ch]Ebm[/ch]
  You sound so innocent, all full of good intent[/tab]
  
[tab]  [ch]Bbm[/ch]                 [ch]Gb[/ch]  [ch]Ab[/ch]
  Swear you know best[/tab]
  
[tab]  [ch]Db[/ch]                   [ch]Ebm[/ch]
  But you expect me to, jump up on board with you and ride[/tab]
  
[tab]  [ch]Bbm[/ch]             [ch]Gb[/ch]       [ch]Ab[/ch]
  off into your delusional sunset[/tab]

[tab]  [ch]Db[/ch]                       [ch]Ebm[/ch]
  I'm not the one who's lost, With no direction, oh[/tab]
  
[tab]  [ch]Bbm[/ch]                [ch]Gb[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]
  But you'll never see, you're so[/tab]
  
[tab]  [ch]Db[/ch]                        [ch]Ebm[/ch]
  Busy making maps, with my name on them in all caps[/tab]
  
[tab]  [ch]Bbm[/ch]                       [ch]Gb[/ch]           [ch]Ab[/ch]
  You got the talking down, just not the listening[/tab]


  CHORUS  
[tab]  [ch]Bbm[/ch]              [ch]Gb[/ch]                [ch]Db[/ch]
  Who cares if you disagree, you are not me[/tab]

[tab]               [ch]Ab[/ch]
  Who made you king of anything, so[/tab]

[tab]  [ch]Bbm[/ch]               [ch]Gb[/ch]            [ch]Db[/ch]/[ch]F[/ch]
  You dare tell me who to be, who died[/tab]

[tab]               [ch]Absus4[/ch]      (delayed)[ch]Ab[/ch]
  And made you king of anything?[/tab]

  
  BRIDGE
[tab]         [ch]Absus4[/ch]      [ch]Ebm7[/ch]
  All my life I've tried[/tab]

[tab]          [ch]Bbm[/ch]                   [ch]Gb[/ch]
  To make everybody happy while I[/tab]

[tab]       [ch]Absus4[/ch]   [ch]Ebm7[/ch]
  Just hurt and hide, waiting for[/tab]

[tab]  [ch]Ebm7[/ch]       [ch]Db[/ch]/[ch]F[/ch]         [ch]Gb[/ch]      [ch]Absus4[/ch]
  Someone to tell me it's my turn to decide[/tab]


  INSTRUMENTAL
[tab]  [ch]Db[/ch] [ch]Ebm[/ch] [ch]Bbm[/ch] [ch]Gb[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]
  (oh oh oh oh)[/tab]

  
  CHORUS
[tab]  [ch]Bbm[/ch]              [ch]Gb[/ch]                [ch]Db[/ch]
  Who cares if you disagree, you are not me[/tab]

[tab]               [ch]Ab[/ch]
  Who made you king of anything, so[/tab]

[tab]  [ch]Bbm[/ch]               [ch]Gb[/ch]            [ch]Db[/ch]/[ch]F[/ch]
  You dare tell me who to be, who died[/tab]

[tab]               [ch]Absus4[/ch]  [ch]Ab[/ch]
  And made you king of anything, oh[/tab]
 
[tab]  [ch]Bbm[/ch]              [ch]Gb[/ch]                [ch]Db[/ch]
  Who cares if you disagree, you are not me[/tab]

[tab]               [ch]Ab[/ch]
  Who made you king of anything, so[/tab]

[tab]  [ch]Bbm[/ch]               [ch]Gb[/ch]            [ch]Db[/ch]/[ch]F[/ch]
  You dare tell me who to be, who died[/tab]

[tab]               [ch]Absus4[/ch]      (delayed)[ch]Ab[/ch]
  And made you king of anything?[/tab]


  OUTRO
[tab]  [ch]Db[/ch] [ch]Ebm[/ch] [ch]Bbm[/ch] [ch]Gb[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]
  Lemme hold your crown, babe, oh oh----[/tab]
  
[tab]  [ch]Db[/ch] [ch]Ebm[/ch] [ch]Bbm[/ch] [ch]Gb[/ch] [ch]Ab[/ch]
  Ah----[/tab]

Note: last chord is Ab major with the 3rd AND 4th, so C and Db are both played.
